name: Sovereign State
additional_info: Landing Galebreathe Mantras, Thundercall Mantras, weapon attacks, and Blightsurger Mantras gives Blight Meter. Press [X] while having at least 30% Blight Meter to enter the Sovereign State. Your weapon is replaced with Sovereign Bangle and the Wither applied on Blightsurger Mantras is increased while in Sovereign State.
desc: Landing physical hits builds your Blight Meter. At full gauge, enter a Blight State that changes your critical and empowers Blightsurge abilities.
